areas: Fulton Street (east and west of arena)
Ionia Avenue (north and south of arena)

pricing.rate: $1.25-$2.00 per half hour in prime areas
pricing.free: After 5pm or 6pm and on weekends (event rates may apply)

items.payment: Motu (Mobile GR) app, cash, credit/debit cards, mobile payment apps
items.availability: Limited during events, better availability on weekdays
items.operator: City of Grand Rapids - Motu (Mobile GR)
items.note: No free street parking available within 0.5 miles of Van Andel Arena during enforcement hours

note: Street meters (Motu/Mobile GR) are the most affordable paid option ($1.25-$2.00 per half hour, $2.50-$4.00 per hour) but have time limits (typically 2-3 hours) and limited availability during events. Meters are enforced Monday-Friday 8am-7pm, free after 5pm or 6pm and on weekends (event rates may apply). No free street parking is available within 0.5 miles of Van Andel Arena during enforcement hours.
